assertions.text: The agent runs all eight checks grouped into Error, Warning, and Info severities.
Each finding states what it is, where it is, and how to fix it.
The agent proposes fixes and waits; it does not apply them automatically.

cases.prompt: 위키 점검해줘 — 링크 깨진 거 있나 봐줘.

assertions.text: The agent detects [[wikilinks]] pointing to non-existent pages and lists them as an Error severity finding.

cases.prompt: 방금 정리한 위키 lint 한번 돌려줘.

assertions.text: If no issues are found, the agent reports the wiki is healthy in one line rather than padding the report.
